headline: The Bull Case For Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Could Change Following Upgraded 2026 AI-Driven Guidance
summary: Earlier in May, Automatic Data Processing raised its fiscal 2026 guidance for revenue and adjusted EPS growth and reiterated its focus on AI-enabled human capital management tools, capital returns, and selective acquisitions. Management’s view that AI is increasing complexity in payroll and compliance, thereby boosting demand for ADP’s services, offers a differentiated angle on technology’s role in HR outsourcing. We’ll now examine how ADP’s upgraded 2026 guidance and AI-focused strategy...
